name: International Energy Conservation Code 2021
copyright_notice: International Energy Conservation Code® 2021 © 2021 International Code Council, Inc.

climate_zone.label: IECC Climate Zone
climate_zone.description: Climate zone is the central scoping variable for envelope, fenestration, and equipment requirements.

compliance_path.label: Compliance Path
compliance_path.description: IECC permits prescriptive, performance (building energy cost or load), or ERI (Energy Rating Index) for residential.

rules.label: Commercial Building Envelope (Prescriptive)
rules.notes_template: Verify envelope insulation and fenestration U-factors/SHGC per Tables C402.1.3 and C402.4 for the project's climate zone ({{placeholders.climate_zone}}).
rules.citation: IECC 2021 §C402 / Tables C402.1.3, C402.4 – Commercial envelope opaque assembly R/U values and fenestration U/SHGC by climate zone.
rules.remediation: Tabulate proposed envelope assemblies and fenestration; demonstrate compliance with C402.1.3 / C402.4.

rules.label: Lighting Power & Controls
rules.notes_template: Verify interior LPDs (Table C405.3.2(1)) and required lighting controls (occupancy sensors, daylighting, exterior, and parking-garage controls).
rules.citation: IECC 2021 §C405 – Limits on interior and exterior lighting power and required lighting controls.
rules.remediation: Provide an LPD compliance form and a controls schedule; ensure mandatory controls are shown on lighting plans.

rules.label: Residential Envelope (Prescriptive)
rules.notes_template: Verify R-values and U/SHGC per Table R402.1.3 / R402.1.2 for climate zone {{placeholders.climate_zone}}.
rules.citation: IECC 2021 §R402 – Residential envelope component values by climate zone.
rules.remediation: Submit an R-value/U-factor schedule and a REScheck (or equivalent) compliance report.

rules.label: Air Leakage – Residential
rules.notes_template: Verify residential air-leakage testing: dwellings shall test ≤ 5.0 ACH50 (CZ 1–2) or ≤ 3.0 ACH50 (CZ 3–8) per §R402.4.1.2.
rules.citation: IECC 2021 §R402.4.1.2 – Air-leakage testing thresholds by climate zone.
rules.remediation: Schedule a blower-door test by a certified rater; provide the test report at C/O.
